description_long: This object is a small bird with a streamlined body, a short neck, and a medium-length tail. Its plumage is primarily a mix of gray and brown tones, with subtle gradations and some darker markings along the wings and tail. The head is rounded with a short, conical beak that is slightly darker than the rest of the body. The wings are folded close to the body, and the tail appears straight and somewhat squared at the tip. The bird's legs are not visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath the body. The overall appearance is typical of a passerine bird commonly found in urban parks and gardens.
description: A small, gray-brown bird with a conical beak and a straight, squared tail. Its plumage is subtly mottled with darker markings on the wings and tail.
description_view_0: Top view showing the bird's streamlined back, folded wings, and straight tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded head, short beak, and narrow body profile.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the bird's full body length, beak shape, and tail outline.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail's squared shape and the subtle patterning on the back.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Mottled with subtle gradients and darker markings on wings and tail
